Product Features

  • [Heavy-Duty Steel Construction] Our engine stand is crafted from high-strength steel, providing a solid and durable frame that can withstand rigorous use. The heavy-duty steel ensures longevity and reliable performance, making it suitable for professional and DIY automotive repairs.
  • [360-Degree Rotatable Mount] Engine Stand features a 360-degree rotating head, allowing you to access all parts of the engine with ease. This functionality simplifies tasks such as engine assembly, disassembly, and maintenance, providing a comprehensive solution for your automotive needs.
  • [Stable U-Shaped Base] Designed with a U-shaped base, this engine stand offers superior stability during use. The wide stance and robust construction prevent tipping and wobbling, ensuring a secure platform for your engine maintenance projects.
  • [Adjustable and Versatile] With four adjustable arms, this engine stand can accommodate a variety of engine sizes and configurations. The adjustable design provides flexibility and precision, making it suitable for different types of vehicles, including motorcycles and cars.
  • [Easy Mobility] Equipped with 4 universal wheels, Engine Stand offers easy mobility and maneuverability. The universal casters allow for smooth and effortless movement around your workshop, ensuring convenience and efficiency during engine repairs.

Description

Multifunctional adaptability: This engine crane is suitable for fixing the engine block for maintenance, and is very suitable for use in automobile factories, repair shops, garages, and other places. There are four wheels on the bottom of the engine support, two of which are fixed and the other two are 360-degree rotatable universal wheels for easy movement. Excellent load-bearing capacity: Our engine block stand provides an excellent load-bearing capacity of up to 1250 pounds. The upgraded U-shaped base replaces the traditional T-shaped base, making the engine bracket more stable and allowing you to safely place most Engine blocks. Maximum Protection: Safety is our top priority. The extra-wide base provides maximum stability, and the mounting head features a jack-lock safety design to prevent injury from accidental rotation. The head assembly has four adjustable arms that can be rotated 360 degree and locked, allowing you to work confidently and efficiently. Extraordinary durability: This heavy-duty portable engine stand features a fully welded heavy-duty steel frame structure, ensuring superior sturdiness and longevity, providing you with reliable support in the future. Easy Assembly and Disassembly: Our engine mounts are designed for convenience and can be quickly assembled and disassembled without any hassle, reducing the time you waste during assembly.
